infotexts.entitydescription.shield_coilgunshotguna: This handcrafted ammunition is intended to shred soft targets at close range.
infotexts.entitydescription.shield_uraniumrodcoilg: This handcrafted ammunition allows the coilgun to fire high-energy radiation pulses.
infotexts.entityname.shield_healthscanner: Smart O2 mask with integrated Health Scanner
infotexts.entitydescription.shield_healthscanner: Allows the user to benefit from the Health Scanner while wearing a smart-breathing diving mask, not to mention the adjustable strap on the back to hold any small items you wish to keep close.
